journey.name: Palm Rejection Verification
journey.description: Verifies that finger/palm touches do not draw lines while a stylus is in use, and that canceled inputs are cleared.

actions.action: Inject finger touch event at (400, 500) with TOOL_TYPE_FINGER
Verify that canvas stroke count remains 0
Inject stylus stroke at (100, 100) with TOOL_TYPE_STYLUS
Verify that canvas stroke count is 1
Inject palm touch event at (200, 200) with FLAG_CANCELED set
Verify that canvas stroke count is still 1 (palm stroke rejected/discarded)
